title: Custom Role where user can only see what they are assigned to
excerpt: We need to be able to share a dashboard with someone in a view only version but have that person NOT be able to get around in any of the other account areas. I see that I can turn off access and permissions, but we want …

posts.author: Tiffany-CWTAcademy (Tiffany Willyerd)
posts.cookedHtml: We need to be able to share a dashboard with someone in a view only version but have that person NOT be able to get around in any of the other account areas. I see that I can turn off access and permissions, but we want them to not even see these areas exist. That’s what we discussed and were told was a feature.
